atikṛcchra [prādi˚ sa.] a. Very difficult.
— cchraṃ-cchraḥ [atikrāṃtaṃ kṛcchraṃ prājāpatyaṃ] Extraordinary hardship, a kind of severe penance to be finished in 12 nights  Ms. 11. 213-4 .
